reviews.review_description:
I like the layout and being in VR definitely helps this game. I get very immersed and it's hard to stop playing.
I use a SteelSeries Free and the shoulder buttons don't do anything, but the game seems to automatically remap fire and special to other available buttons so I had no problems using it.

Pretty cool - Graphics reminds me of Blaze Rush - which is a good thing.

Controler: one stick is for direction - the other one is for rotation view and the aim is with the headset.  A bit tricky at first but fun.

I tried quiet a few times with only the soldier then figure out i can use the little tank - way easier with the tank.  

Finished the first mission.  Was fun

Definetly need a blue tooth controler

PS: an easy level would be nice

developer_response.body: bluetooth controllers are supported (Xbox BT controller tested and recommended). Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Amazing game especially for the price. Hasn't frozen once. Graphics are  nice and crisp. 8 maps and good progression through the game. Gamepad supported.
